channel.title: Tops on takuti.me
channel.description: Recent content in Tops on takuti.me

item.title: about
item.description: Takuya Kitazawa (a.k.a. takuti) is a data science engineer at Arm Treasure Data and committer of Apache Hivemall. twitter — twitter.com/takuti github — github.com/takuti linkedin — linkedin.com/in/takuti instagram — instagram.com/takuti tumblr — takuti.tumblr.com rss — takuti.hatenablog.com mail — k.takuti at gmail.com Education The University of Tokyo M.S. in Information Science and Technology Tokyo, Japan / March 2017 The University of Aizu B.S. in Computer Science
